purpose: Minimal operator handoff for the next Noor first-subscriber sprint action.

sprint.goal: Get the first real Noor subscriber signal without sending a newsletter or enabling checkout.

nextAction.label: Parent group seed
nextAction.action: Post the parent-group copy in one warm Arabic-speaking parent group.

localizedCopy.ar:
نجرب هذا الأسبوع روتيناً صغيراً للأطفال: قصة نور الصينية في 3 دقائق.
الحزمة المجانية: https://fursay.com/share/noor?source_id=noor_first_subscriber_sprint_parent_group&creator=fursay&placement=parent_group
فيها قصة قصيرة، عبارة صينية مع Pinyin، ونشاط بسيط بين الأهل والطفل.
localizedCopy.en:
Trying a tiny Arabic-Chinese routine with kids this week.
Free Noor 3-minute story pack: https://fursay.com/share/noor?source_id=noor_first_subscriber_sprint_parent_group&creator=fursay&placement=parent_group
It is short: one story, one Chinese phrase with Pinyin, and one parent-child activity.

nextAction.copy:
Trying a tiny Arabic-Chinese routine with kids this week.
Free Noor 3-minute story pack: https://fursay.com/share/noor?source_id=noor_first_subscriber_sprint_parent_group&creator=fursay&placement=parent_group
It is short: one story, one Chinese phrase with Pinyin, and one parent-child activity.
nextAction.recorderPostedCommand: npm run noor:sprint:log -- --day 1 --status posted --notes "shared noor_growth_signals_7d tracked link; waiting for anonymous aggregate report" --next-action "run npm run noor:sprint:review after the event report is available" --dry-run
nextAction.recorderDryRunCommand: npm run noor:sprint:log -- --day 1 --status needs_retry --notes "checked noor_growth_signals_7d aggregate only" --next-action "wait for aggregate signal or retry the next planned placement" --dry-run

operatorChecklist.label: Copy the planned parent note
operatorChecklist.action: Use the Arabic parent copy from the next-action handoff without adding price, checkout, or payment language.
operatorChecklist.evidence: The shared message contains the planned tracked Fursay link and no personal subscriber data.

operatorChecklist.label: Open the tracked link before sharing
operatorChecklist.action: Open the primary link once and confirm it lands on the Noor story pack or sample preview with the expected source_id and placement.
operatorChecklist.evidence: The URL remains on fursay.com and keeps the planned source_id, creator, and placement attribution.

operatorChecklist.label: Record the posted state
operatorChecklist.action: npm run noor:sprint:log -- --day 1 --status posted --notes "shared noor_growth_signals_7d tracked link; waiting for anonymous aggregate report" --next-action "run npm run noor:sprint:review after the event report is available" --dry-run
operatorChecklist.evidence: The log records only posted/awaiting-report status, public source_id, placement, and non-identifying notes.

operatorChecklist.label: Review anonymous aggregate results
operatorChecklist.evidence: Use noor_growth_signals_7d or the listed report query; record signal evidence only as aggregate counts, never names or emails.

privacy.boundary: Record anonymous aggregate evidence only; do not store email, name, phone, address, subscriber IDs, or MailerLite IDs.
